# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

resources: 
- name: rgResourceGroup1   # resource group for the first deployment of all vms in azure VMs are deployed to here, it can be any existing Resource Group Name or we have created a new one named 'rg' and use that. It depends on requirement whether you want another unique ID by using UniqueID
  type: Microsoft.Resources/resourceGroups   # define the resource provider for this operation (Microsoft is default)   
  apiVersion: "2019-10-01"      
  properties: {location}    
            
parameters:     
 - name: location           # Define a parameter that will be passed in when running these templates. This could also contain any other variable information you might need to pass into your template         
   type: string             
    defaultValue: 'eastus'
